acceptance_targets: [chapter_04_F001] PASS only if the revised 59-89 span contains at least one paragraph of direct embodied observation (not chart summary) with a clear physical reaction from Lena, and the revised 161-165 span ends on a concrete operational consequence rather than abstract dread language. FAIL if the reveal remains primarily forensic paraphrase.

[chapter_04_F002] PASS only if revised lines corresponding to 209-213 include an explicit block-and-countermove exchange in dialogue and revised line 287 equivalent shows a specific verification action under risk. FAIL if obstruction remains summarized as a montage sentence.

[chapter_04_F003] PASS only if the revised 231-252 span shows at least two distinct verification steps before the policy-link conclusion and includes one temporary dead-end or ambiguous read that must be resolved. FAIL if all major links still resolve in a single uninterrupted run.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the revised 59-89 span contains at least one paragraph of direct embodied observation (not chart summary) with a clear physical reaction from Lena, and the revised 161-165 span ends on a concrete operational consequence rather than abstract dread language. FAIL if the reveal remains primarily forensic paraphrase.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift at the chapter's core horror turn: the manipulated-remains reveal is filtered through report diction and summary labels ("assembly," "hybrid work," "manipulation") more than immediate embodied encounter, which blunts the scene's physical and moral consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:59-89, add one on-table inspection beat where Lena directly encounters a concrete body artifact (texture, odor, seam failure, residue transfer) before Rao's formal summary at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:95. At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:161-165, replace at least two abstract horror labels with specific observed consequence and an immediate decision/action beat.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if revised lines corresponding to 209-213 include an explicit block-and-countermove exchange in dialogue and revised line 287 equivalent shows a specific verification action under risk. FAIL if obstruction remains summarized as a montage sentence.
findings.problem: Timidity in conflict rendering: key institutional obstruction is compressed into procedural summary (looping desks, cleaned portal, six-week pull) instead of dramatized friction, reducing felt pressure at exactly the point the chapter claims active suppression.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:209-213 with one concrete blocking exchange (policy citation plus personal risk from a clerk) and Lena/Beau's tactical pivot. At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:287, replace recap with one in-scene verification beat that shows the cost (time, credibility, or exposure) of pulling the six-week stack.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the revised 231-252 span shows at least two distinct verification steps before the policy-link conclusion and includes one temporary dead-end or ambiguous read that must be resolved. FAIL if all major links still resolve in a single uninterrupted run.
findings.problem: Causal compression weakens earned consequence: three major breakthroughs (vehicle reroutes, Bell and Sons detours, fuel-card corroboration, Judge Pike policy link) arrive in rapid sequence with minimal resistance once archives open, making the turn feel too convenient for the chapter's prior obstruction setup.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:231-252 so one of the three discoveries is delayed, contested, or initially inconclusive. Insert an intermediate verification step between the first manifest anomaly and the Judge Pike linkage, and force Lena/Beau to choose between speed and evidentiary confidence.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
